source: ClawHub trending + web search via tavily (multiple guides: pcbuildadvisor, fast.io, o-mega, agensi)

ecosystem.total_skills: ~13,729 (Agensi May 2026) / ~5,400+ curated on Awesome OpenClaw Skills (VoltAgent)
ecosystem.clawhub_landing: Self-Improving Agent (3.9k★) still #1; Skill Vetter (1.2k★); Proactive Agent (814★); Gog/Google Workspace (933★ — still rising)
ecosystem.security_landscape: Snyk reported 280+ leaky skills exposing API keys/credentials in plaintext; ClawHavoc found 341 malicious skills (~12% of catalog); ClawHub now shows publisher handles + org trust indicators
ecosystem.format_adoption: SKILL.md format adopted by Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, ChatGPT (LobeHub) — industry standard

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: SkillScan
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: tokauthai
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Security gate — every skill MUST pass SkillScan before use. Gains traction as ecosystem matures.
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: monitor — already have skill-vetter installed which provides equivalent manual vetting

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: Multi Search Engine
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: gpyangyoujun
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: 16 search engines (7 CN + 9 Global) with auto-fallback. Good for cross-region search
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — tavily + web_search + deep-research-pro already cover search needs comprehensively

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: Fastio (dbalve/fast-io)
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: dbalve
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Persistent storage + RAG for agents. 19 MCP tools: file upload/download, URL import, RAG chat, share management, task/worklog/annotation workflows
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — workspace files + memory system already handle persistent storage; RAG needs not urgent

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: AgentMail
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: adboio
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: API-first email for AI agents: programmatic inbox creation, send/receive, webhook notifications, semantic search. No IMAP/SMTP hassle
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — no programmatic email use case currently

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: Ontology
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: oswalpalash
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Typed knowledge graph for structured agent memory and composable skills

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: Code (ivangdavila/code)
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: ivangdavila
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Structured coding workflow: planning → implementation → verification → testing. Enforces deliberate process, no auto-execution
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — native tools and existing skill stack already handle coding tasks effectively

security_highlights: Snyk: 280+ leaky skills exposed — skills instruct agents to pass API keys/passwords/credit cards through LLM context window in plaintext
ClawHavoc (Koi Security): 341 malicious skills found, ~12% of catalog
Trend Micro confirmed AMOS stealer distributed via fake OpenClaw skills
OpenClaw now supports signed manifests and moderated releases to counter supply chain risks
trending_observations: Security skills (SkillScan, Skill Vetter) gaining traction — ecosystem response to widespread credential leaks
Gog/Google Workspace (933★) continues rising — most versatile productivity integration
Self-Improving Agent still #1 at 3.9K★ — dominant leader
steipete consistently dominates with multiple top utility skills
No breakthrough new skill warrants installation this week
recommendations: Current installed skill stack remains sufficient — no urgent additions this week
Continue monitoring SkillScan as potential complement to skill-vetter if it gains community trust and active maintenance
If email automation becomes relevant later, AgentMail is the clear first choice
Maintain manual vetting per AGENTS.md policy — ClawHub's security issues are not improving fast enough to trust auto-install
